amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 6 — paragraph 2 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 6 — paragraph 2 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2 c. National supervisory authorities shall submit a yearly report to the AI Office detailing the number of notifications received, the related high-risk areas at stake and the decisions taken concerning received notifications
parliament_text: 2 c. National supervisory authorities shall submit a yearly report to the AI Office detailing the number of notifications received, the related high-risk areas at stake and the decisions taken concerning received notifications
